calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Dec-22-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gerald Woods for and with Margaret Milano. Gaetano Milano and Vincent Milano (Sons) also present.

Mr. Woods stated that he has a declaration from both sons in support of the petition, that it has not been filed and that they have joined in the petition. Counsel is to provide an endorsed copy of the declaration to the Clerk. The Court granted the Petition for Spousal Property (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
